tasks.title: Custom Tool File Loader

test_criteria: Custom tools load from project-level .opencode/tools/ directory
tasks.impl_notes: Requires FR-007. Update AGENTS.md with custom tool documentation is still pending.

tasks.title: TUI Plugin TypeScript SDK
tasks.description: Create TypeScript SDK for TUI plugins with commands.register(), routes.register(), dialogs.register(), slots.register(), themes.install(), themes.set(), events.on(), state.get(), state.set(), and onDispose lifecycle. Module: crates/sdk/
tasks.impl_notes: Requires FR-018. Package at sdk/typescript/packages/plugin-tui/

tasks.impl_notes: Requires FR-019. Integration with iterate-prd.sh and workspace Cargo.toml still pending.

tasks.title: GitHub Workflow Generation
tasks.description: Add github install subcommand to CLI, create workflow file template, implement GitHub App installation flow, add secrets setup automation. Module: crates/git/
tasks.impl_notes: Requires FR-016. CLI documentation update still pending.

tasks.title: GitLab CI Component
tasks.description: Create GitLab CI component template, implement GitHub workflow trigger examples, comment/PR trigger parsing, CI secret loading for GitHub Actions, GitLab CI component support. Module: crates/git/
tasks.impl_notes: Requires FR-017. GitLab CI component template, GitHub workflow triggers, and CI secret loading implemented. Documentation update still pending.

tasks.title: tui.json Ownership Enforcement
tasks.description: Audit and enforce tui.json exclusively owns theme settings, keybind settings, and TUI plugin config. Remove TUI settings from main config schema. Module: crates/config/, crates/tui/
test_criteria: No TUI settings leak to main config
tasks.impl_notes: Requires FR-009. Deprecated fields still present for backwards compatibility. Config documentation update still pending.

tasks.title: Desktop/Web/ACP Interface
tasks.description: Implement desktop app startup flow, web server mode, and ACP startup/handshake. Add configuration options. Module: crates/server/
tasks.impl_notes: Requires FR-015. ACP handshake already implemented in crates/core/src/acp.rs. Desktop app and web server mode remain TODO.

tasks.title: VCS Worktree Root Distinction
tasks.description: Add worktree_root field to ProjectInfo, update project detection logic. Module: crates/core/
tasks.impl_notes: Implemented worktree_root field and detection logic. Tests pass.

tasks.title: AGENTS.md Upward Scanning
tasks.description: Implement upward directory traversal from CWD to worktree root, add scanning for AGENTS.md files, add configuration for scanning behavior. Module: crates/core/
test_criteria: AGENTS.md files scanned from CWD to worktree root
tasks.impl_notes: Implemented agents_md.rs module with upward scanning, worktree root detection, and configuration options. Tests pass.

tasks.title: MCP OAuth CLI Commands
tasks.description: Add opencode mcp auth subcommands, implement OAuth flow for MCP servers, add token storage. Module: crates/cli/
test_criteria: OAuth flow for MCP servers works
tasks.impl_notes: Implemented mcp auth subcommands: list, login, logout, status, cleanup. OAuth flow uses device code flow. Token storage via McpAuthTokenStore.

tasks.title: Session Compaction Boundaries
tasks.description: Verify checkpoint-based compaction semantics, review compaction boundaries, add configuration options. Module: crates/core/
tasks.impl_notes: Added configurable thresholds to CompactionConfig: warning_threshold, compact_threshold, continuation_threshold, preserve_recent_messages, preserve_system_messages, summary_prefix. Added TokenBudget::from_config and TokenBudget::with_thresholds methods. Added 4 new tests for configurable thresholds. Checkpoint semantics verified - checkpoints are independent snapshots, compaction modifies in-memory session.

test_criteria: Tools can be registered from plugins
tasks.impl_notes: Requires 08-plugin. Tests and documentation still pending.
